query: At a broad regional scale, are the carbonate detections in Jezero associated with the blue end of the olivine 1 micron band range or the redshifted olivine unit?

row.paper: Brown, A.J., et al., 2020. Olivine-carbonate mineralogy of the Jezero crater region. JGR Planets, 125(3), e2019JE006011. DOI:10.1029/2019JE006011
row.query: At a broad regional scale, are the carbonate detections in Jezero associated with the blue end of the olivine 1 micron band range or the redshifted olivine unit?
